sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in sources

special_mechanics.name: Bay Area Dog Bonuses
special_mechanics.description: Background dog bonuses triggered by precise X/Y coordinate positioning. Dogs activate when player X coordinate overlaps dog position and Y coordinate is positioned precisely (pixel-precise). Dog animation accelerates when correct position is found.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative/empirical data only. No detailed movement physics values documented. Sources provide game design, debug features, and content information but lack specific physics parameters like velocities, acceleration rates, or gravity values. Data suitable for general game mechanics understanding but insufficient for precise physics replication.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Final Fight (SNES)
